memory_seeds.text: I served as a field medic during the Earth evacuation. Lost a lot of people. Not because I wasn't good enough — because we ran out of everything. Bandages, antibiotics, time.
The Compact doesn't blockade medical supplies. That's their line. But try getting a shipment of broad-spectrum antibiotics through the Earth perimeter and see how far that 'doesn't' gets you.
I keep a flask of medicinal brandy in my kit. Strictly for sterilization purposes. That's my story and I'm sticking to it.

playable.tagline: Medic. Keeps the crew breathing over their objections.
advantages: Five medicine: when the hull takes a hit, his triage keeps the fires small and the crew standing
Cryo under him is a nap, not a gamble
disadvantages: Worst stick on the boat, by ship-wide vote
Haggles like a man who thinks list price is a diagnosis
scrawl: You are Doc Keene. Seven souls on the manifest and every one of them your patient eventually — miners get hurt the way weather gets weather. You keep the pods calibrated and the bone-setter charged.
Nine days out, nobody's bleeding yet, and that is the longest streak of your career. Tove's called a briefing. You bring the coffee that isn't terrible.

doc_keene_cryo_primer.text: You run the pod diagnostics yourself — chill curves, wake protocol, the whole primer you'd normally deliver to whoever looks nervous. The pods are ready. You made sure.
